message:
fix(moe): add CSR sparse corrections for Q3_K down projection

Previously the Q3_K down projection kernel didn't apply CSR sparse
corrections, causing NaN outputs due to accumulated quantization errors.

Changes:
- Add moe_down_proj_q3k_sparse kernel combining Q3_K matmul + CSR corrections
- Add Q5_K matvec kernel for attention O projection
- Wire up pipeline_down_proj_q3k_sparse with CSR buffer bindings
- Fix dispatch axis ordering (row_idx from X, batch from Y)

The CSR corrections (delta = Q4K - Q3K) are now applied to down projection,
fixing the NaN issue in hybrid Q2_K inference mode.
